overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character moves from a covered walkway past vending machines, crosses a street, and explores a downtown area with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with convenience vending area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past illuminated vending machines and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: rows of illuminated vending machines with various products displayed
tall palm tree trunk visible on the left side of the walkway
overhead concrete structure providing partial cover over the walkway
cyan neon lighting strips along the building edges

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk next to a convenience store with rows of illuminated vending machines. The area is lit with cyan neon strips and partially sheltered by an overhead concrete structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with elevated walkways and corporate signage

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto the main street crossing
yellow taxi passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering the main thoroughfare with towering buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past on the street

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign spanning across the street overhead
pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead with glass sides
elevated train track structure running above the street level
tall building with reflective glass facade and multiple floors

segments.scene_description: Crossing from the covered walkway onto a main city street dominated by the large KENDACHI corporate sign overhead. A yellow taxi passes by on the left as the character enters the wide urban thoroughfare with elevated walkways and monorail tracks visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking down the main street and looking up at the massive buildings and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk on the right side

entered.detail: large floating advertisement displaying animated content against the sky
cluster of extremely tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows
large screen displaying advertisements on the building face

segments.scene_description: Walking down the main street surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic billboards and neon signage. The camera tilts upward to take in the massive scale of the buildings against the dusk sky before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with reflective pavement and commercial storefronts

events.description: moves from main street into open plaza area with reflective tile surfaces

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past commercial buildings with reflective surfaces

entered.detail: commercial building with prominent DASHI signage and illuminated entrance
open pedestrian area with glossy reflective pavement tiles
contemporary architecture with clean lines and extensive glass facades

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open plaza with reflective paved surfaces and modern commercial buildings. The DASHI store is visible on the left as the character walks past other pedestrians in this spacious urban area with clean contemporary architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit corridor into the expansive openness of a bustling corporate thoroughfare. It begins along a covered sidewalk beside a convenience store, gliding past rows of illuminated vending machines under the glow of cyan neon strips and a concrete overhead structure. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up and shifts from the narrow walkway onto a wide main city street. The camera then passes under a massive, towering KENDACHI corporate sign while a yellow taxi streaks by on the left. Finally, the view expands to reveal the full scale of the urban environment, with elevated walkways and monorail tracks stretching across the sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense corridor of neon-lit skyscrapers that gradually opens into a spacious, modern urban plaza. It begins by advancing down a main street flanked by towering buildings covered in holographic billboards and vibrant signage, with the camera tilting upward to capture the massive scale of the architecture against the dusk sky. As the camera continues forward, the claustrophobic height of the city gives way to a wide-open plaza featuring reflective paved surfaces and clean, contemporary commercial buildings. The scene then shifts past a DASHI store on the left and through a crowd of pedestrians, finally settling into the expansive atmosphere of the downtown commercial district.
